attacking_style: Participates in early breakaways as a tactical decoy rather than for personal stage ambitions, willing to commit energy early in the stage.
team_tactics: Deployed as sacrificial decoy in early breaks to split opponents' focus and enable protected teammates to counterattack from chasing groups with less marking pressure.

vulnerability: Limited personal results opportunities when deployed in team-first tactical roles; effectiveness depends on teammates capitalizing on created advantages.
